title: (f)printf parsing assertion failure
body:
The FIRRTL here is invalid, produced while manually reducing a larger test case.  Looks like we fail hard if there aren't enough operands to (f)printf?

Input:
```firrtl
FIRRTL version 5.1.0

circuit Oops:

  public module Oops:
    input clk : Clock
      printf(clk, UInt<1>(0h1), "oops: %d")
```

(originally found using fprintf, both trigger the failure)

Failure:
```
firtool: /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/llvm/include/llvm/ADT/ArrayRef.h:253: const T &llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Value>::operator[](size_t) const [T = mlir::Value]: Assertion `Index < Length && "Invalid index!"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.	Program arguments: ./build/bin/firtool /home/will/fprintf-assert.fir
 #0 0x000055af15b5f096 llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:834:13
 #1 0x000055af15b5c9a3 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Signals.cpp:105:18
 #2 0x000055af15b5f7c4 SignalHandler(int, siginfo_t*, void*) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/llvm/lib/Support/Unix/Signals.inc:426:38
 #3 0x00007f9f3ba41470 __restore_rt (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x41470)
 #4 0x00007f9f3ba99cdc __pthread_kill_implementation (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x99cdc)
 #5 0x00007f9f3ba413c6 gsignal (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x413c6)
 #6 0x00007f9f3ba2893a abort (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x2893a)
 #7 0x00007f9f3ba2885e _nl_load_domain.cold (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x2885e)
 #8 0x00007f9f3ba395a6 (/nix/store/g3s0z9r7m1lsfxdk8bj88nw8k8q3dmmg-glibc-2.40-66/lib/libc.so.6+0x395a6)
 #9 0x000055af15bfc40f (anonymous namespace)::FIRStmtParser::parseFormatString(llvm::SMLoc, llvm::StringRef, llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Value>, mlir::StringAttr&, llvm::SmallVectorImpl<mlir::Value>&) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRParser.cpp:0:0
#10 0x000055af15be7e11 (anonymous namespace)::FIRStmtParser::parsePrintf() /home/will/src/sifive/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRParser.cpp:3116:7
#11 0x000055af15be7e11 (anonymous namespace)::FIRStmtParser::parseSimpleStmtImpl(unsigned int) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRParser.cpp:2770:12
#12 0x000055af15be0b51 (anonymous namespace)::FIRStmtParser::parseSimpleStmt(unsigned int) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRParser.cpp:2711:17
#13 0x000055af15be0b51 (anonymous namespace)::FIRStmtParser::parseSimpleStmtBlock(unsigned int) /home/will/src/sifive/circt/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Import/FIRParser.cpp:2704:9
(snip)
```
